acceptance_conditions.label: all source, patch, build, binary, input, target, and R161 bindings remain exact
three post-registration process artifacts retain 256 score-traced calls
all calls use the frozen instrumented binary and process environment
native 128, ascending 64, and descending 64 calls complete without replacement
every call retains combine, compare, candidate, leaf-shadow, ErrorMap, and row hashes
the first divergence between source f64, compensated, and exact-binary64 shadows is classified
all mapping and no-solution outcomes remain classified
strict Decreasing comparisons are retained regardless of verdict
the R157 input, target descriptor, and source-faithful R161 boundary remain bound
forbidden bug, hardware, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: a source- and binary-bound score-combination trace over one frozen R157 input and its arithmetic shadows
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a confirmed Qiskit bug, a numerical remedy, cross-platform determinism, hardware performance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
